title: Has anyone tried linking TikTok leads into Monday CRM alongside Aircall?
excerpt: I’ve been experimenting with TikTok ads recently and starting to see more inbound leads coming through there. Right now, I’m using Aircall for phone communication and Monday CRM to track everything, but I’m not sure of t…

posts.author: evelyngrace1 (Evelyn Grace)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve been experimenting with TikTok ads recently and starting to see more inbound leads coming through there. Right now, I’m using Aircall for phone communication and Monday CRM to track everything, but I’m not sure of the best way to bring TikTok leads into the same workflow so nothing slips through the cracks.

Has anyone here set up an integration or workaround for capturing TikTok leads and syncing them into Monday alongside Aircall calls? Did you use Zapier, Make, or something custom?

I’d love to hear how others are handling this—whether it’s tracking ad responses, routing calls, or just making sure the data stays clean.
